zh.Urach, Württemberg, Germany: 德國爾特波格奧拉赤 武拉賀
zh.Urach, Oberamt Urach, Württemberg, Deuts: 德國爾特波格奧拉赤 武拉賀武拉賀
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jolanthe Gräfin von Urach Arberg於大約1177年出生在德國爾特波格奧拉赤 武拉賀武拉賀時，她的父親Egino IV. Graf von Urach genannt der Bärtige24歲，母親Agnes von Zähringen18歲。她於大約1196年與Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1226年在法國諾門迪享年50歲。

zh-hans.Urach, Württemberg, Germany: 德国爾特波格奧拉赤 武拉賀
zh-hans.Urach, Oberamt Urach, Württemberg, Deuts: 德国爾特波格奧拉赤 武拉賀武拉賀
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jolanthe Gräfin von Urach Arberg于大约1177年出生在德国爾特波格奧拉赤 武拉賀武拉賀时，她的父亲Egino IV. Graf von Urach genannt der Bärtige24岁，母亲Agnes von Zähringen18岁。她于大约1196年与Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1226年在法国諾門迪享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gräfin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Swedish: ornamental or habitational name formed with an unexplained (placename) element + the adjectival suffix -in, a derivative of Latin -in(i)us ‘relating to’.
Slovenian: probably a topographic name derived from grad ‘castle’, or from archaic gradina ‘site of ancient fort’.
Galician (Gradín): habitational name from a place called Gradín, in Lugo and Pontevedra provinces (in Galicia, Spain), from Latin (villam) Gratini, from the Latin name Gratinus.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .
Chinese: variant of   Wong  .
Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Urach
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ulrich  .
English: probably from the Old English personal name Wulfrīc (see Wooldridge ).

Scottish: shortened form of McUrich, itself an Anglicized form (with loss of the internal fricative) of Gaelic Mac Íomhair ‘son of Íomhar’, Gaelic form of the Old Norse personal name Ívarr (see Iverson 2).

variants.name: Ulrich
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Hans, Gerhard, Klaus, Frieda, Fritz, Reinhard, Alfons, Alois, Bernd.

German: from the personal name Ulrich, Old High German Odalrīc, composed of the elements odal ‘inherited property, fortune’ + rīc ‘power’. The name was borne by a 10th-century Christian saint, bishop of Augsburg, whose fame contributed greatly to the popularity of the personal name in German- and Slavic-speaking areas in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Urish
meanings: Probably an altered form of German   Urich  .

variants.name: Urick
meanings: Americanized form of German   Urich  .
Americanized form of Slovak and Czech Urík or Urik: unexplained.
Americanized form of Slovak   Jurik   and also of Polish   Jurek  .

nameMeanings.name: Arberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several settlements called Amberg (literally ‘by the mountain’), including a city in Bavaria. It could also be a topographic name of identical etymology.

Jewish (Ashkenazic): possibly from 1; alternatively, it may be a habitational name from the city of Hamburg (see Hamburger ). Many varieties of Yiddish lack h and -burg is sometimes replaced by -berg in Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Hamburger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Jakob, Avrohom, Isadore, Myer, Nachman, Yaakov, Yehuda, Yisroel, Zvi.  German Kurt, Monika, Frieda, Siegmund, Viktor.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Hamburg (see   Hamburg  ).

variants.name: Amberger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard.
German: habitational name for someone from Amberg, see   Amberg  . Compare   Amburgey  .

nameMeanings.name: Jolanthe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern coinage based on Greek iolē ‘violet’ + anthos ‘flower’. It is known chiefly as the name of the eponymous fairy heroine of a Gilbert and Sullivan opera, first performed in 1882 .

en.lifeSummary: When Jolanthe Gräfin von Urach Arberg was born about 1177, in Urach, Urach, Württemberg, Germany, her father, Egino IV. Graf von Urach genannt der Bärtige, was 24 and her mother, Agnes von Zähringen, was 18. She married Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau about 1196. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1226, in Normandy, France, at the age of 50.

fr.Corcelles, Neuchâtel, Neuchâtel, Switzer: Corcelles, Neuchâtel, Canton de Neuchâtel, Suisse
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jolanthe Gräfin von Urach Arberg est née environ 1177, à Urach, Oberamt Urach, Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Egino IV. Graf von Urach genannt der Bärtige, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Agnes von Zähringen, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau environ 1196. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1226, à Normandie, France, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jolanthe Gräfin von Urach Arberg um 1177 in Urach, Oberamt Urach, Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Egino IV. Graf von Urach genannt der Bärtige 24 und ihre Mutter Agnes von Zähringen 18. Sie hat um 1196 Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1226 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jolanthe Gräfin von Urach Arberg è nata il circa 1177 nel Urach, Oberamt Urach, Württemberg, Germania, sua padre, Egino IV. Graf von Urach genannt der Bärtige, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Agnes von Zähringen, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau circa 1196. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1226, nel Normandie, Francia, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jolanthe Gräfin von Urach Arbergが約1177年にドイツウuルッテンバーグオバーアムト ウラチウラチで生まれた時，父Egino IV. Graf von Urach genannt der Bärtigeは24歳，母Agnes von Zähringenは18歳であった。約1196年にUlrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidauと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1226年にフランスノーマンディで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jolanthe Gräfin von Urach Arberg(이)가 대략 1177년 독일 wu르테버그 오베램트 라치 라치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Egino IV. Graf von Urach genannt der Bärtige(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes von Zähringen(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 대략 1196년 Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1226년 프랑스 노먼디에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jolanthe Gräfin von Urach Arberg nasceu aproximadamente 1177, em Urach, Oberamt Urach, Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Egino IV. Graf von Urach genannt der Bärtige, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Agnes von Zähringen, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau aproximadamente 1196. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1226, em Normandie, França, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jolanthe Gräfin von Urach Arberg родилась около 1177 г. в местности урэич, обирамт урэич, вuрттембирг, Германия, её отцу по имени Egino IV. Graf von Urach genannt der Bärtige было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes von Zähringen, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau около 1196 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1226 г. в местности норманди, Франция в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jolanthe Gräfin von Urach Arberg nació aproximadamente 1177, en Urach, Oberamt Urach, Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Egino IV. Graf von Urach genannt der Bärtige, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Agnes von Zähringen, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau aproximadamente 1196. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1226, en Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 50 años.
